metadata.note: Plan mode blocked file creation for with_skill evals 1-5. Process assertions still valid.

notes: ITERATION 2 vs ITERATION 1: Pass rate improved from 57.5% to 91.1% (+33.6 percentage points)
CRITICAL FIX VALIDATED: Conflict detection now STOPS and WAITS for user approval (Eval 2 + Eval 5 both pass)
Iteration 1 Eval 2 failed user-approval (agent rationalized past it). Iteration 2 Eval 2 passes (agent stops and asks).
Immutability (Eval 5): 100% pass rate with skill. Agent quoted the HARD-GATE verbatim and stopped.
File creation (Eval 1, 3, 4): Plan mode blocked with_skill agents from writing files. Process assertions still valid.
Without-skill baseline for Eval 5 also scored well (83%) — agent naturally cautious about changes. But without skill, no formal process or documentation.
Architecture awareness (Eval 4): Agent read architecture.md and reflected performance in scenarios. Advisory extension point not mentioned (1 fail).
Complex multi-feature (Eval 6): Both with and without skill produced 5 files with 36-38 scenarios. With-skill used tags, Outline, Background more consistently.
Token overhead is minimal: +2628 tokens (+17.6%) for +24.1% pass rate improvement. Time actually decreased by 4.9s.
